goal: Add GET /api/og endpoint to server.py that fetches a URL and returns Open Graph metadata (title, description, image, url)

details.location: Add new FastAPI route near other API endpoints
requirements: Validate URL scheme: must start with http:// or https://
Parse HTML with regex for og:title, og:description, og:image meta tags (no external parser deps)
Return JSON: {title, description, image, url} — empty strings if missing
Handle errors gracefully: return 200 with empty fields or 400 for invalid URL
details.notes: Use httpx.AsyncClient with timeout. Keep regex simple: <meta[^>]+property=["']og:title["'][^>]+content=["']([^"']+)["'].

guard_focus: Is httpx already available? Is there an AsyncClient we can reuse?
Does the regex handle both single and double quotes around property/content?
Are error responses safe (no internal info leaked)?
